personas.name: aggressor
personas.description: Tank push with HQ-pressing infantry pushers. Adds bombers/fighters for air-heavy maps, cruisers/submarines for sea-heavy maps. Now ferries infantry on amphibious maps via the starting transports/landers. Accepts trades but still captures.

personas.name: turtle
personas.description: Tank + infantry walls on terrain. Slow push; ignores recon. Adds aatank for air defence and cruiser/battleship for sea defence. Uses starting submarines on naval maps.

personas.name: economist
personas.description: Cheap-units swarm; captures fast and supports with a tank or two. Adds cruiser as a mid-cost sea fighter. Uses starting transports/landers to ferry infantry but doesn't build new ones.

personas.name: balanced
personas.description: Tuned tier3 baseline — no major weight changes, control persona. Lightly extended with a representative mix of new unit types; uses starting amphibious units via the new candidate generator.
